full_description: Improve your productivity with Focus Mode. This app helps you stay on track by using proven techniques like the Pomodoro timer and website blockers. The Pomodoro timer works by dedicating a set interval of time to a task, followed by a short break, helping you stay concentrated and avoid burnout. The website blocker removes distractions by restricting access to non-essential websites during your work sessions. By minimizing distractions and maximizing your work time, you can achieve your goals more efficiently. Key features include customizable work and break intervals, a schedule to plan your day, and statistics to track your progress. Download Focus Mode now and take control of your time management.
